title: Cancellation Policy
description: Seller-declared cancellation terms for a product. Declares the minimum notice period required before cancellation takes effect and any associated penalties. Buyers accept these terms by creating a media buy against the product.

notice_period.description: Minimum notice period before cancellation takes effect (e.g., { interval: 30, unit: 'days' }). A guaranteed buy canceled without sufficient notice may incur cancellation penalties.

penalty_description.description: Human-readable description of the cancellation penalty when the notice period is not met (e.g., '50% of remaining committed spend', 'full flight cost'). Informational for buyer agents.
